kill_gate_name: helium tau_c at 10 mK on actual diamond surface
why_it_can_kill_QTA: Canonical 292 us threshold cannot be evaluated without measurement; this is the primary bottleneck of the entire architecture
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: In-system tau_c measurement on real diamond at 10 mK with controlled 3He coverage; paired 3He vs 4He comparison

why_it_can_kill_QTA: Co-equal bottleneck with tau_c; if contrast collapses at base temperature the sensing scheme fails independent of tau_c
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: ODMR contrast measurement at 10 mK on the actual diamond with proposed laser and readout geometry

why_it_can_kill_QTA: If T2* is well below the assumed value the SNR equation fails regardless of tau_c or C_contr
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Ramsey T2* on the actual sample at 10 mK

kill_gate_name: Mode B LCVD deposition yield per pulse
why_it_can_kill_QTA: Without measured yield the Mode B viability is undefined; affects whether Mode B is even useful before any Mode D question
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Witness coupon plus QCM plus AFM/Raman/XPS after Mode B pulse train

kill_gate_name: residual H2 coverage after bakeout / NEG / cryotrap
why_it_can_kill_QTA: Excess H2 on the surface contributes to NV decoherence and corrupts tau_c interpretation
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Post-conditioning H2 partial pressure (calibrated RGA) and equivalent surface coverage

kill_gate_name: actual G_eff (silver-sinter Kapitza conductance at 10 mK)
why_it_can_kill_QTA: If G_eff is much lower than assumed the sample stage cannot follow Mode D load profile and Mode D becomes unworkable
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Step-response measurement after Ag sinter installation

kill_gate_name: fs-laser thermal recovery to Mode D baseline
why_it_can_kill_QTA: If recovery time is much longer than 42 ns assumed the cumulative pulse heating exceeds budget and Mode D fails at the operating repetition rate
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Pump-probe or fast thermometric measurement of surface and bulk recovery after a Mode D readout pulse

kill_gate_name: Mode B -> Mode C -> Mode D isolation and recovery
why_it_can_kill_QTA: If Mode C cannot return the sample to a Mode D-clean state the entire mode-separated architecture is moot
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Coordinated thermal/vacuum/contamination/radiation/RF/optical/vibration/NV-baseline measurement at the C-to-D transition

kill_gate_name: measured radiation load into the 10 mK stage
why_it_can_kill_QTA: If shutter + baffles + apertures cannot get measured radiation load below Mode D budget then Mode D never starts
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Radiometric sample-stage heat load measurement with shutter stack in operating configuration

why_it_can_kill_QTA: If RF + blackbody leakage through wiring + filters is above the Mode D dephasing budget the NV signal is corrupted at base temperature
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Sample-stage heat load and NV ODMR/Ramsey baseline measurement with full wiring/filter chain installed

why_it_can_kill_QTA: Direct line-of-sight or stray scatter from warm stages to 10 mK adds heat and adds NV background; with no measurement the budget is unverified
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Line-of-sight audit and per-stage optical-power measurement; sample-stage heating with apertures open/closed

kill_gate_name: chemical memory from Mode B contaminating Mode D
why_it_can_kill_QTA: If cryopanels saturate or release on warmup the Mode D surface sees Mode B chemistry and tau_c interpretation collapses
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Per-species RGA + QCM + witness coupon analysis through full Mode B -> C -> D cycle

kill_gate_name: magnetic shielding without disturbing NV bias field
why_it_can_kill_QTA: If the magnetic shielding disturbs the calibrated NV bias-field geometry then NV ODMR/Ramsey measurements are corrupted; superconducting shields add trapped-flux risk
measurement_that_kills_or_saves_it: Magnetometer field-map before and after shielding; NV ODMR baseline before and after; trapped-flux assessment for superconducting option
